title: Stage 21 PR and External Integration

messages.completed: Stage 21 created or updated the PR path and recorded Jira communication results.
messages.blocked: Stage 21 could not complete PR or Jira integration and recorded the blocker.

next_actions.completed: Proceed into Stage 22 traceability capture and final run closeout.
next_actions.blocked: Resolve the PR or Jira integration blocker, then rerun Stage 21.

handoff_summaries.completed: Stage 21 completed the external integration path with repo-backed evidence for PR and Jira progression.
handoff_summaries.blocked: Stage 21 recorded an external integration blocker that needs follow-up before closeout.

delivery_posture: Prefer portable GitHub CLI integration for PR creation and updates.
Use Jira communication through approved GHDP paths only.
Block PR progression until the branch is rebased onto origin/develop and merge-commit free.
Write external links and comment outcomes back into repo-backed artifacts.
summary_expected_next_step: Finalize traceability, resume state, and scenario evidence in Stage 22.
